description: ADAudit Plus is running at http://localhost:8081/ (login: admin/Admin@2024). Your security operations team has been notified of suspicious activity involving local Windows accounts in the past 24 hours. Use ADAudit Plus to investigate account management events (creations, modifications, password resets, group membership changes) and failed logon attempts. Create a new technician account for ongoing monitoring with username 'soc_analyst1', full name 'SOC Analyst', email 'soc.analyst@corp.local', password 'SOCTeam@2025', and role 'Operator'. Document your investigation findings, including all discovered usernames, event types, and recommended remediation steps, in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\account_threat_report.txt.
